message:
fix(pager): suppress dead_code warning on WaitPathMode::LegacyCondvarTimeout

The LegacyCondvarTimeout variant is a compile-time alternative wait path
mode. Both constants (GROUP_COMMIT_WAIT_PATH_MODE and
PUBLISHED_SEQUENCE_WAIT_PATH_MODE) are set to KeyedEventcount, so the
legacy variant is never constructed — but it IS handled in match arms
(lines 284, 306) and exists as a documented configuration option.

This warning propagated to downstream crates (jsm CLI) as a dependency
warning that couldn't be suppressed locally.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
